mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, avatar, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0
AND username LIKE '%' || #{username} || '%'
AND real_name LIKE '%' || #{realName} || '%'
AND phone LIKE '%' || #{phone} || '%'
AND status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_sys_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO sys_user (id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, avatar, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE sys_user SET del_flag = 1, update_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
